_comment: Project CSS conventions. The codebase uses 4-space indentation (match app/utils convention), does not enforce alphabetical property order (readability: group by purpose), and uses CSS custom properties (var(--...)) plus `gap` which stylelint's default dictionary predates. The legacy `indentation` rule was removed in stylelint 15+ (moved to @stylistic/stylelint-plugin), so it is omitted from the rules block to keep Codacy from emitting `Unknown rule indentation`.
